description_long: This is a rectangular, messenger-style briefcase with a prominent red body and black accents. The main compartment is secured by a large front flap, which is held in place by two vertical black straps with buckles. The briefcase features a long, adjustable black shoulder strap with a padded section for comfort, attached to the sides with sturdy hardware. The exterior material appears to be a durable, possibly waterproof synthetic fabric, giving it a rugged, utilitarian look suitable for urban environments. There is a small metallic or plastic badge or logo on the front flap, and faint text or markings are visible on the red surface, suggesting a recycled or upcycled material. The back and sides are plain, with no visible external pockets or reinforcements.
description: A red, rectangular messenger-style briefcase with black straps and a long adjustable shoulder strap, featuring a front flap and a small badge or logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red flap, two black vertical straps with buckles, and a small badge or logo at the center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and the thickness of the briefcase, with the shoulder strap visible from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black back with the shoulder strap arching over the top, no visible pockets or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim profile and the attachment of the shoulder strap.
attribute_handle_type: One long, flexible, adjustable shoulder strap with a padded section, made of synthetic webbing, attached to the sides with metal or plastic hardware.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Two buckle closures on the front vertical straps securing the flap; no visible key or combination lock.
attribute_brand_logo: A small badge or logo is present on the center of the front flap, but the brand is not identifiable.
